LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_CommandDesc: Send an available fingerspike to implant itself into a fresh humanlike corpse, raising it as a tireless hemogel-fed worker.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_HumanlikeOnly: The target must be a dead humanlike corpse.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_MutantCorpse: Mutant corpses cannot be raised as hemoghouls.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_NoFingerspike: No available fingerspike can perform the implantation.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_NoReachableFingerspike: No available fingerspike can reach the corpse.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_CannotStart: The hemoghoul implantation could not start.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_Failed: The corpse could not be raised as a hemoghoul.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_AlreadyAssigned: A hemoghoul implantation is already assigned.
LanguageData.FB_Hemoghoul_TargetAlreadyAssigned: This corpse is already assigned to a flesh operation.
